---
title: "Quarto 1"
author: "Avinesh Saravana"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
penguins %>%
  drop_na(bill_length_mm, flipper_length_mm, species, island) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = bill_length_mm, y = flipper_length_mm, color = species)) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.75, size = 3, width = 0.3, height = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, size = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ island) +
  scale_color_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    title = "Palmer Penguins: Bill Length vs Flipper Length",
    subtitle = "Species differences across Palmer Archipelago islands",
    x = "Bill length (mm)",
    y = "Flipper length (mm)",
    color = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
